meaning: adj.协同的,协作的 协同作用的
examples: Therefore we have put forward to synergetic management.
Research progression and further plan for synergetic information process.
The result indicates that the status between industrial structure and technology structure in China now has very low synergetic effects.
This approach is interesting in its own right and at the same time synergetic with several other projects we are funding through the Intel Labs Academic Research Office.
